_comment: Claude Code example. Merge the 'hooks' object into ~/.claude/settings.json (user-global) or .claude/settings.json (per-project). The 'make install-claude-hooks' target does this idempotently and preserves any other settings keys. Notification is scoped to the genuine needs-you types (permission_prompt|elicitation_dialog) so housekeeping notifications (auth_success) and the post-turn idle nudge (idle_prompt) don't flip the row to waiting.
